app.title: NeuroScope
app.subtitle: Visual Deep Learning Builder
app.tagline: Build deep learning models by dragging, dropping, and configuring — no code required

builder.drag: Drag layers from the palette to the canvas
builder.extend: Extend your model with optimizers, loss functions, and more
builder.export: Export as Jupyter notebook or YAML
builder.canvas_empty: Drag a layer here to start building
builder.canvas_hint: Click a layer to select it, drag to reposition

layers.Conv2d: Convolutional layer — extracts spatial features using learnable filters
layers.BatchNorm: Batch normalization — stabilizes training by normalizing activations
layers.ReLU: ReLU activation — outputs max(0, x), the most common activation function
layers.GELU: GELU activation — smoother alternative to ReLU, used in transformers
layers.Sigmoid: Sigmoid activation — maps to (0, 1), can cause vanishing gradients in deep networks
layers.Tanh: Tanh activation — maps to (-1, 1), can cause vanishing gradients in deep networks
layers.Softmax: Softmax — converts logits to probabilities for classification
layers.Linear: Fully connected layer — learns global patterns from flattened features
layers.MaxPool: Max pooling — reduces spatial dimensions by taking maximum values
layers.AvgPool: Average pooling — reduces spatial dimensions by averaging values
layers.GlobalAvgPool: Global average pool — averages each feature map to a single value
layers.Dropout: Dropout — randomly zeros neurons during training to prevent overfitting
layers.LSTM: LSTM — Long Short-Term Memory, captures long-range dependencies in sequences
layers.GRU: GRU — Gated Recurrent Unit, simplified alternative to LSTM
layers.Concat: Concatenation — merges tensors along a dimension
layers.Add: Addition — element-wise sum, used in residual connections
layers.SiLU: SiLU/Swish — x * sigmoid(x), smooth modern activation
layers.LeakyReLU: LeakyReLU — allows small negative slope to prevent dead neurons
